title: Forking Repositories Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on GitHub forking mechanics.

questions.question: What is the primary role of 'Forking' in the context of Git and platforms like GitHub?
options: To create one's own copy of a project to make changes to without affecting the original version

questions.question: Regarding forking, what is the key benefit of having your own individual copy of a project?
options: It provides cloud-based hosting for you to make and test changes
It makes your local machine faster
It deletes old commits by mistake
